entities.name: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of managing data and information to address challenges in international agricultural research and development

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL TRIAL AND EVALUATION DATA
entities.description: Data derived from agricultural trials used to improve crops and management practices

entities.name: CROPS
entities.description: Agricultural plants targeted for improvement through trial and evaluation data

entities.name: MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural methods and techniques used to improve crop production

entities.name: AGTRIALS
entities.description: An initiative to build an online database of agricultural trials applying interoperability and open access principles

entities.name: INTEROPERABILITY
entities.description: The principle of ensuring different information systems can exchange and use information

entities.name: OPEN ACCESS
entities.description: The principle of making research data and information freely available to the public

entities.name: ONLINE DATABASE
entities.description: A digital resource used to store and manage agricultural trial data

entities.name: USER SURVEY
entities.description: A method used to gauge user perceptions of the utility of the AgTrials database

entities.name: USER INTERACTION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis of data regarding how users interact with the AgTrials platform

relationships.description: AGTRIALS is an effort to build an ONLINE DATABASE
AGTRIALS applies the principles of INTEROPERABILITY
AGTRIALS applies the principles of OPEN ACCESS
AGRICULTURAL TRIAL AND EVALUATION DATA is used to improve CROPS
AGRICULTURAL TRIAL AND EVALUATION DATA is used to improve MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
AGTRIALS is a database designed for AGRICULTURAL TRIAL AND EVALUATION DATA
USER SURVEY was used to gauge the utility of AGTRIALS
USER INTERACTION ANALYSIS was used to evaluate the AGTRIALS platform
AGTRIALS serves as an experience in improving AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE MANAGEMENT
